programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: Duelo en Diablo
programme.desc: El explorador Jess Remsberg dirige una caravana a través de territorio hostil hasta Fort Conchos, pero en su valor se oculta un motivo: saldar cuentas con el hombre que cree que mató a su esposa. Protagonizada por James Garner y Sidney Poitier.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Stardust: el misterio de la estrella
programme.desc: Con la esperanza de conquistar a una chica, Tristán hace una promesa a una estrella fugaz. Pronto descubre que la estrella es en realidad una belleza celestial llamada Yvaine, a quien la vieja bruja Lamia intenta robar la juventud.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?
programme.desc: Ocuparse de Arnie es una tarea que puede ser bastante demandante para Gilbert, al menos mientras trabaja en la tienda local.

programme.title: Dream lover: el amante ideal
programme.desc: El arquitecto Ray Reardon lleva una vida de ensueño, repleta de lujos y éxitos. Mientras se recupera de su reciente divorcio, Ray conoce a Lena Mathers y se enamora... Pero su sueño se torna en pesadilla cuando Lena le lleva al borde del abismo.

programme.title: Yo Soy La Salsa
programme.desc: Más que un género musical, la salsa fue un movimiento cultural que surgió de los barrios más humildes del Caribe.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: La fuerza de la verdad
programme.desc: Henry es un abogado exitoso que necesita ganar a toda costa, incluso si debe sacrificar a su familia. Pero un disparo detiene el veloz ascenso de Henry, dejándolo incapacitado y sin recuerdos de su vida anterior.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: En nombre del amor
programme.desc: De Nicholas Sparks, el autor best-seller, llega esta conmovedora historia sobre hasta dónde estamos dispuestos a llegar para mantener viva la esperanza del amor.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: A una famosa cortesana de ricos y famosos en el París previo a la Primera Guerra Mundial se le pide que enseñe a un niño de 19 años. La aventura que se convierte en un acalorado y apasionado asunto que resulta en luchas de poder y luchas por amor.

programme.title: Lágrimas de cristal
programme.desc: Un ranchero muy apuesto mantiene un apasionado romance con la mujer del hombre más poderoso del pueblo, Fausto Rodriguez, quien no está acostumbrado a perder y establecerá una fuerte rivalidad con el muchacho.

programme.title: Casadas con el mismo hombre
programme.desc: El matrimonio de Mitch con Candy se basa en una mentira. Su familia cree que es un agente de la CIA, pero en realidad está con otra familia.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Narc: Calles peligrosas
programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: Pisando furete
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: Peligro en Bangkok
programme.desc: Joe (Nicolas Cage) es un asesino profesional que aterriza en Bangkok para ocuparse de unas obligaciones y se encuentra inesperadamente entrenando a un joven protegido y enamorándose de una mujer que desconoce su verdadero trabajo.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Vivir es fácil con los ojos cerrados
programme.desc: El año 1966, en España, un profesor de inglés es acompañado por dos mochileros en su misión de conocer a John Lennon.

programme.title: La corona partida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de Isabel la Católica en 1504 comienzan tiempos de incertidumbre en los que se viven luchas de poder entre Fernando el Católico y Felipe el Hermoso, cuya principal víctima fue Juana la Loca, legítima heredera al trono de Castilla.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que asesinó a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, en un trágico accidente en el Día de San Valentín, cinco mineros murieron cuando sus supervisores dejaron su cargo para ir a un baile. Después de un año de la catástrofe, el único superviviente regresa al pueblo con una sangrienta venganza.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber Of Fleet Street
programme.desc: Depp interpreta el personaje que da nombre a la película, un hombre enviado injustamente a prisión que jura venganza, no solo por su castigo, sino también por las devastadoras consecuencias para su esposa e hija.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: La maldición de la llorona
programme.desc: Una joven hereda una mansión, solo para descubrir que está hechizada por brujas y espíritus malignos.

programme.title: Y todos arderán
programme.desc: Un pueblo español se verá sumido en el caos cuando la aparición de una extraña niña con poderes oscuros amenaza con cumplir una profecía que provocaría el fin del mundo.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber Of Fleet Street
programme.desc: Depp interpreta el personaje que da nombre a la película, un hombre enviado injustamente a prisión que jura venganza, no solo por su castigo, sino también por las devastadoras consecuencias para su esposa e hija.

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: El señor mamá
programme.desc: Michael Keaton y Terri Garr protagonizan este clásico en el que interpretan a una pareja que ve alterada su vida cuando Garr se pone a trabajar y Keaton se convierte en quién tiene que lidiar con los niños ¡Y con una lavadora que también se queja!

programme.title: Cásate Conmigo
programme.desc: Después de perder a la mujer de sus sueños, Anderson (Biggs) es empujado por su mejor amigo para conocer a una completa extraña. Justo cuando pensaba que su vida había terminado, se da cuenta de que es sólo el comienzo.

programme.title: Mi gran boda gay italiana
programme.desc: Antonio ha encontrado por fin al amor de su vida, Paolo, con quien vive felizmente en Berlín. Aunque todavía no están seguros de la reacción de sus familias, deciden casarse en Italia, en el pequeño pueblo donde viven los padres de Antonio.

programme.title: La chica de rojo
programme.desc: Cuando Teddy se cruza con una mujer que usa un provocativo vestido de seda rojo, descubre que ella es la modelo elegida por su agencia para una nueva campaña. Desde entonces, el sueño de Teddy será tener un romance con ella.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando’s only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: Funny Face
programme.desc: Paris, the City of Light, shines even brighter when Audrey Hepburn and Fred Astaire team up for the only time and bring their luminous starpower to this exquisite musical featuring songs by George and Ira Gershwin.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Indiscreet
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

programme.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
programme.desc: Zero Mostel, Buster Keaton, Phil Silvers, and an all-star cast scam their way through this boisterous romp amidst gorgeous girls, mistaken identities, stunning surprises, cunning disguises, and great Sondheim songs.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever…with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fiancé stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's dreams come true, and so do Oliver's nightmares, when Eb discovers a runaway boy sleeping in the hay in their barn. Lisa is only too excited about the idea of having the sounds of platters of little feet around the house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Arnold, the Ziffels' television-loving pig, has taken on a paper route to save enough money for a new color set. But when bank robbers show up and threaten his dreams, and Lisa and Oliver are held captive in their own home, Arnold has to fight back.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the first day of spring arrives in Hooterville. And who better to lead the town in celebrating it than Lisa. She is resolved to show Oliver just what spring is all about and sets out to produce a Spring festival celebration.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recounts the wrath he encountered when he broke his engagement with his hometown sweetheart, Dorothy after he and Laura became engaged.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob finds himself in hot water after giving a television interview in which he unwittingly portrays his wife Laura as a nut.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob leaves the show after Mel rejects his script and is upset when Buddy and Sally don't join him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura watch a scary movie only to find certain details of that movie coming true the following day.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura tries to break Rob of his expensive habit of picking up the check.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: To his regret, Rob ignores Laura's warning to be careful on the slopes during his first skiing excursion.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Petries hire a painter who ends up painting much more than just their living room.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Laura, and the office gang put together a variety show to help out an old friend.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar learns the park where he and his cronies played baseball is going to be the site for an office building, Oscar becomes civic-minded and decides to run for city councilman.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Singer-composer Paul Williams is the special guest star in this episode written especially for him. Felix Unger's daughter has a crush on Williams and runs away from home to follow him wherever he appears.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix discovers that his father and Oscar's knew each other in the old days and that Oscar's father was responsible for Felix's father's downfall.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar Madison takes a job as a sports radio talk-show host but doesn't tell anyone until he finds out whether the station is going to make it permanent.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A drug dealer flees the scene after he runs over a young boy. When the offender is arrested, Chief Gillespie is determined to see him stand trial, but the Feds offer him a deal that will set him free if he testifies against a powerful drug lord.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Lieutenant Bubba Skinner rekindles a romance with his high school sweetheart, the newly-widowed Christine Millings. To Bubba's surprise, her attorney is murdered and she's suddenly looking like the prime suspect.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While fishing on his day off, Bubba Skinner's dog unearths a dead baby. The investigation leads to a mentally-challenged girl and her family who’s not interested in talking. Will they get past the family’s secrets to learn the truth about the baby?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Having served his time, Prosper Hoag is on parole and back home in Sparta. The folks in town will never forget the accident he caused that resulted in the death of three children and permanent injuries to two others, but will they forgive him?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Chief Gillespie's personal relationship with Harriet DeLong is tested when her ex-husband Vic Glendon is caught committing an armed robbery, and her son Eugene is suspected of being involved when some of the stolen money is found in his possession.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sweet's friends, the Tibbits, are an older couple that own a bookshop in Sparta. When Mrs. Tibbits is shot and killed during an apparent robbery, Gillespie and Tibbs question the suspicious circumstances around her death. Was her death planned?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs is working hard to reunite his family, when he discovers that his aunt's son may be involved in a murder. Virgil is caught between hurting his aunt who loves her son and bringing justice to the town he works to protect every day.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The owner of a local gym in Sparta, Kathleen Wheartly, tries to protect her delinquent brother, Jack, who is falsely accused of murder. She soon finds that her own life is in danger when a ruthless bounty hunter shows up in town, looking for Jack.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: It’s Christmastime and an eager journalist from the local Sparta Herald newspaper begs to interview the police force; however, when she twists their stories to fit her negative agenda, the officers learn a hard lesson about the power of the press.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Gillespie and Tibbs investigate a fatal car crash. The driver, Robbie Jeffries, suffered severe injuries in the accident, and his girlfriend Becky was killed. Everyone is surprised when the medical reports show Robbie may have been poisoned.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Ray Garrett was convicted of murdering his wife's lover. Pleading his innocence from the start, he was still convicted of the crime and sentenced to death. Will time run out for the death row prisoner as the Sparta police attempt to save his life?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Terry and Derek Johnson are two brothers at odds with each other. Terry makes good grades and has a scholarship waiting for him, but Derek has chosen to deal drugs. When a local boy dies of an overdose, Gillespie wants Derek charged with murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The Sparta Police investigate a suspicious car crash and discover connections to a fraudulent development plan to build a new mall in Sparta and to the murder of Virgil Tibbs’ old friend who had invested his life savings into the deal.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Julie Lofton is a blind woman who witnesses the murder of her neighbor and quickly calls the Sparta police. As the police investigate, they discover the murder was committed to cover up an industrial crime, and now Julie's life may be in danger.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's Cindy Garrett and Philip Kobler's wedding day and they're taking "til death do us part" literally, when they plan the murder of Cindy's father to take place right after their nuptials!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's day begins with a phone call from a kidnapper who happened to dial the wrong number - his! The kidnapper believes he's called the original victim and demands Dr. Sloan deliver money if he wants to see his son alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Novelist Kay Ludlow is dealing with writer's block while her literary agent Jim Rothman pressures her to turn out 350 pages by the following day to secure his two million dollar share.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda cruises into cyberspace during a spell of boredom and randomly enters the website "Welcome to Joanne's living room" for mindless entertainment.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve joins his troubled partner, Reggie Ackroyd, in a rehab facility for stressed-out cops. Reggie seems delusional and keeps blaming a murderer he caught for abducting his wife and daughter, and Steve encourages him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a busy day for the homicide unit and Community General when three murders take place. Further investigation reveals that none of the suspects knew their victims, and they are all terminal patients at Community General.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse and Susan are on their way to Mount Carmel for a romantic getaway weekend but detour to a fishing town when their car breaks down. They grab a bite at the local diner when Susan sees a man she used to know.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When resident Paul Brewer is killed, it's the second murder in a month at the exclusive gated community, Hillview Estates. With no leads on the killer, Steve goes undercover as Dr. Steve Brewer, a community resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Personal grievances get in the way of detective Harry Trumble's retirement party. Trumble never forgave Dr. Sloan for marrying his college sweetheart and dedicated his life to his work.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mañana, en una zona desértica en las afueras de Phoenix, un motociclista descubre el cuerpo de una joven mujer. Había sido golpeada, amarrada, estrangulada y posiblemente violada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp is coming to an end. Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake. Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chichuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire. One contestant will be placed in a Plexiglas box filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: One contestant will launch herself from a pneumatic chair off into the water. Couple will be placed together in a Plexiglas box with separated. One contestant will drop from a helicopter and swim over to a buoy with a key on it.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be hanging by their ankles from a crane above the water. Couples must sit inside a barrel in a kneeling position. Contestants are driving on a swervy course while trying to run through a series of barrels and wooden structures.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be dropped into the water. Couples will be presented with a picnic baskets filled with a Fear Factor style meal. One contestant will be underneath the train at the back of a car, while her partner will be on the side of the same car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are strapped to a line on the deck, with their bungees attached to a helicopter. Contestants will cut their way through two separate ropes. Contestants are connected to a helicopter and must repel down.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars as they are flown underneath the belly of a helicopter, eat bees, are launched off a building through glass, deal with the horror of bull testicles and drive a car through the back of a moving semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Five teams of 2 are bungied off a cliff, must eat leeches, must run through a burning building, deal with the Wheel of Misfortune, and finally grab flags off a moving car while dangling of a crane. All is the hopes of winning $100,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four couples compete for $50,000. In order to win they must face getting catapulted off the top of a tall building, transfer snakes with theirs mouths and transfers flags to a partner hanging under a helicopter, all while riding a personal watercraft.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk, eat a disgusting meal consisting of roaches, grasshoppers, blood salsa and maggots and lastly must leap back and forth from a moving station wagon onto a bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other. They must launch their car into a lake, dive for cow hearts in gallons of blood, and run, fly, swim and climb while trying to blow up a fueling station.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000. They face three extreme stunts as they are stuck in a car being flown under two helicopters, must drink a Fear Factor Crappacino and lastly are dropped through a collapsing tower.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition while in the back of a truck, must devour nasty scorpions, and are strapped to the front of a cement truck as it smashes through structures.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Tess revisits the Greenes. She tells them God says Josh needs to go with Tess. Josh has to help Monica see, since she is temporarily blinded. They travel to a city filled with tension.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Andrew comes to the aid of Meg Savoy, who surprises her husband on a flight to Paris for their anniversary but gets the bigger shock when she discovers that he’s involved with a pregnant younger woman

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess help the Monroes, whose worst nightmare is realized when they discover that the baby they adopted years ago had actually been kidnapped and now his biological father wants him back

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Tragedy hovers over Dr. Mike’s family, and Daniel falls seriously ill, as the diphtheria epidemic continues to rage.

programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: For the first time in "Hell's Kitchen" history, chefs from prior seasons return to compete with the remaining competitors.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode's challenge, each chef must create something special from Alaskan salmon. The winner gets a helicopter ride and lunch at LA's Water Grill. The losers prep fish for the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The final four chefs eat a dish prepared by Chef Ramsay. For their challenge, they must recreate it in 35 minutes. The winner goes to a baseball game while the losers move furniture out of the dorms.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: While wearing new white dinner jackets, the final contestants prepare a menu consisting of four appetizers, four entrees and three desserts.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Eighteen chefs vie for a head chef position at Gordon Ramsay Steak at the Paris Las Vegas hotel and casino. Ramsay splits up the contestants into two teams.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 17 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: The chefs remove scallops from a mound of ice and seaweed before cooking them to Chef Ramsay's standards. The first team to make six plates of five scallops wins a day of yacht cruising.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 16 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: The two teams must cook a meal for sixty newly naturalized U.S. citizens. The winners go on a safari trip in San Diego while the losers do manual labor at the Ballona Wetlands.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 15 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: The aspiring chefs create four different lamb dishes. The winners spend a day at the horse races while the losers first wash paint off the sheep, then clean the kitchens for the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 14 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: The remaining contestants tackle Mexican cuisine in a challenge judged by executive chefs John Sedlar and Thomas Ortega. The winners dine at one of the judge's gourmet restaurants for lunch.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 13 Chefs Compete, Part 1
programme.desc: Fashion and food mix when the contestants prepare an haute couture-inspired menu for designers. The winners get new wardrobes while the losers prepare a dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 13 Chefs Compete, Part 2
programme.desc: The runway show dinner proves distracting for some, while other contestants succeed despite the pressure to time the service perfectly with the show.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: For the dinner service, the remaining contestants must serve Tito Ortiz and Sugar Ray Leonard protein-packed dishes that'll knock their socks off.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 11 Chefs Compete, Part 1
programme.desc: The contestants must prepare a thirty-minute meal in which a slot machine randomly determines the ingredients that they can use. The winners go on a shopping spree for kitchenware and utensils.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The chefs continue to compete at Gordon Ramsay Steak at the Paris Las Vegas Hotel & Casino, but personal conflicts distract from their work.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacob está cansado de fracasar en el cuestionario de capitales diario de la Señorita Angustias.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Se acerca el festival de ciencia de la escuela y Jacob aún no tiene un proyecto.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacobo y Buford construyen la 'Máquina Predicto-Mágica' para el quiosco del adivino en la verbena de la escuela.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacobo y Buford tratan de rehabilitar a un mapache que hurga en la basura.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonic, Sonia y Manic regresan a Mobodoon, su lugar de nacimiento, una ciudad bella y alegre. La bienvenida se interrumpe cuando Sleet y Dingo llegan para recaudar impuestos por orden del Dr. Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sonia viaja al este de Mobius para visitar a su amiga Mindy en la residencia de los LaTour.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Sleet y Dingo planean recolectar los impuestos que el Duque de Velcronia le debe a Robotnik y quedarse con el dinero.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: El siniestro Robotnik chantajea a Cyrus, un antiguo amigo de Sonic, manteniendo a su padre cautivo.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda
programme.desc: Mientras visitan Puerto Mobius, Sonic, Manic y Sonia se enteran de que una gran bestia marina está hundiendo los barcos.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: El tema del desfile anual de Bootsville este año es muy lejos en el espacio, y el padre quiere anunciar la Casa del Canje con una carroza de ovni. Él construye una pista de hielo y un fuerte sobre el búnker secreto de Frisky Bits del Sr. Gato.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: El Sr. Gato aprovecha que el padre convierte la Casa de Canje en una casa de diversiones de terror para buscar sangre de verdad. Coop trae a casa un proyecto de ciencia y Sr. Gato somete a las plantas a un súper fertilizante que las vuelve asesinas.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: En un viaje al museo, el Sr. Gato intenta activar un antiguo dispositivo alienígena y permitir que un ejército del pasado vaya al presente. Cuando Millie encuentra una nueva amiga de la escuela idéntica a ella, empieza a ignorar al Sr. Gato.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: El proyecto secreto del Sr. Gato arruina la tarea de Coop, que lo toma prestado para su proyecto científico. La ciudad espera que el equipo de Coop gane el torneo de béisbol, pero pasan más tiempo luchando contra la máquina del Sr. Gato que jugando.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop intenta evitar que Sr. Gato robe todos los Frisky Bits de pescado del supermercado y le eche la culpa a él. Los padres de Dennis y Coop apostaron a que sus hijos pueden ganar en un torneo de golf del vecindario.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop quiere un alto al fuego en las fiestas para poder disfrutar de una Navidad normal con su papá, Millie y sus abuelos. Pero ¿El Sr. Gato puede portarse bien por mucho tiempo?

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: El director Tragón secuestra un cargamento de revistas del Capitán Canadiense esperando venderlas y obtener grandes ganancias.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Carl Fester Rey tiene un nuevo plan para ganar dinero.

programme.title: Jacob Two-Two
programme.desc: Jacobo compra un rascador de espaldas que concede deseos.

programme.desc: Todo le sale mal a Jacobo porque es demasiado pequeño.

programme.title: La fauna de Fanny
programme.desc: Un proyecto escolar de Fanny desaparece y Lalo es acusado, por equivocación, de comerse la tarea. Fanny y su pandilla construyen una casa de jirafa para Julia.

programme.title: La fauna de Fanny
programme.desc: Papá trae a casa un misterioso regalo. Fanny y Danny entran a un concurso de cometas y hacen una cometa linda y sencilla con sus animales.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders, Ricky is a candidate for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Despite the reservations of her husband, Lucy decides to help Fred pick out a birthday present for Ethel. She picks out a pair of toreador pants, which Ethel thinks are unflattering as well as too big.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Caroline Appleby is visiting from New York and is excited to see all the stars Lucy had promised. Of course Lucy exaggerated her access to celebrities but plans on fooling her nearsighted friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum and Higgins help a mixed martial arts fighter who is being pressured by a gang to throw an illegal fight; Kumu is arrested for stealing an artifact from a collector that should be returned to its original resting place.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: As a major hurricane hits the island, Magnum and his friends find shelter inside La Mariana, along with two armed killers who are also escaping the dangerous storm; Rick must confess to TC that he let the insurance lapse on the bar.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When a wealthy man hires Magnum and Higgins to find his missing wife, they are stunned when a tragedy occurs as a result of their investigation; Kumu is suspicious of her stepdaughter's boyfriend.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When an overenthusiastic neighborhood watch group asks Magnum and Higgins to investigate a shady character living on their block, they are shocked to find that they may have inadvertently stumbled upon a serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.desc: MK and Ne Zha desperately try to stop Monkey King before it's too late. Mei trains to control the Samadhi Fire.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Day of the Departed
programme.desc: Cole returns to Yang’s haunted temple to seek revenge on the former Airjitzu Master who turned him into a ghost, he accidentally uses a Dark Magic blade that unleashes the spectral forms of Ninjago’s greatest villains and traps himself in the temple!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Spell at the Waterfall
programme.desc: Egalt teaches the Rising Dragon to the ninja; Sora and Riyu learn Spinjitzu from Rontu; Cole reaches the Monastery with the Finders and sets off on an adventure with Zane.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: While searching for his parents, Arin and the Ninja rescue a baby dragon, uncovering a new mystery and mission for the team.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Inside the Maze
programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.desc: A gorilla wrestling match, pushy moose antlers, long pelican bills that snap at any enemy within range, and a megashark's stereo sniffer.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
